# youtrack_database_backup_settings (Resource)

YouTrack database backup settings configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_database_backup_settings" "example" {
  location        = "/opt/youtrack/backups"
  files_to_keep   = 7
  cron_expression = "0 0 2 * * ?"
  archive_format  = "ZIP"
  enabled         = true
  notified_users = [
    "admin",
    "ops.user"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `archive_format` (String) Archive format for backups (ZIP or TAR_GZ)
- `cron_expression` (String) Cron expression for backup schedule
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether scheduled backup is enabled
- `files_to_keep` (Number) Number of backup files to keep
- `location` (String) Backup storage location
- `notified_users` (List of String) List of YouTrack user logins notified about backup status

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Backup settings identifier
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Database backup settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current backup settings.
terraform import youtrack_database_backup_settings.example global
```
